content_markdown: Which of the following lists snow, desert and ocean in increasing order of magnitude of albedo?

diagram_metadata.description: A table showing four options (A-D) with three columns representing the progression from lowest albedo to highest albedo.

options.label: A
options.text: Lowest: snow; Middle: desert; Highest: ocean

options.label: B
options.text: Lowest: snow; Middle: ocean; Highest: desert

options.label: C
options.text: Lowest: ocean; Middle: desert; Highest: snow

options.label: D
options.text: Lowest: desert; Middle: ocean; Highest: snow

vibe_explanation: Albedo is the ratio of reflected radiation to incident radiation. Dark surfaces like the ocean absorb most light (low albedo, approx 0.06), while light-colored surfaces like snow reflect most light (high albedo, approx 0.8 to 0.9). Deserts fall in between (approx 0.3).
